eligibility: Any citizen born within the territorial jurisdiction of NCT of Delhi.
required_documents: Address Proof (Voter ID, Electricity Bill, etc.)
fees: ₹20 for a printed copy, free for first digital copy.
how_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the official MCD portal (mcdonline.nic.in).
Step 2: Register or log in to the citizen portal.
Step 3: Navigate to 'Birth & Death Registration' and fill out the online form.
Step 4: Upload the required documents.
Step 5: Pay the fee and submit. A registration number will be generated for tracking.

eligibility: Must be 18 years or older, must possess a valid Learner's Licence.
fees: ₹200 for DL test, ₹200 for smart card.
how_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the Parivahan Sewa portal (parivahan.gov.in).
Step 2: Select 'Driving Licence Related Services' and choose Delhi.
Step 3: Click 'Apply for Driving Licence'.
Step 4: Enter Learner's Licence details and upload documents.
Step 5: Book a slot for the driving test, pay the fee, and appear for the test.
Step 1: Visit the Delhi e-District portal (edistrict.delhigovt.nic.in).
Step 2: Register/Login and go to 'Apply for Services'.
Step 3: Select 'Issuance of Income Certificate'.
Step 4: Fill the form, upload self-attested documents, and submit.
Step 5: Keep the application number for status tracking.

eligibility: Property owners within the jurisdiction of MCD.
required_documents: Property Ownership Documents (if UPIC not generated)
fees: Varies based on property unit area value, age, and use.
processing_time: Instant digital receipt generation upon payment.
how_to_apply: Step 1: Visit the MCD portal (mcdonline.nic.in).
Step 2: Select 'Property Tax' and choose your zone.
Step 3: Enter UPIC to fetch property details.
Step 4: Calculate tax using the online calculator.
Step 5: Pay online using Net Banking, UPI, or Cards to get the receipt.

eligibility: Residents or property owners in Delhi requiring a fresh water connection.
required_documents: Proof of Ownership/Occupancy (Registry, Power of Attorney)
fees: Varies between ₹500 to ₹3000 depending on plot size and usage.
how_to_apply: Step 1: Go to DJB's Revenue Management System (djb.gov.in).
Step 2: Click on 'Apply for New Connection'.
Step 3: Fill out the application form with property details.
Step 4: Upload scanned copies of the required documents.
Step 5: Pay the application fee and track the application status.
